title: Zaraksander

{{Quote|Cyrstas Eloinie, the daughter of Darred Eloinie, CEO of Eloinie Petro-Munitions on Zaraksander, she finds herself in the wrong place at the wrong time.|Valken Gresh, ''Great Hunts I've Lived To Tell About''|<ref name="GG10" />}}
'''Zaraksander''' was an astronomical object in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Imberlin sector/Legends|Imberlin sector]]. It was the site of the [[Fioer desert]], and an [[Eloinie Petro-Munitions]] munitions [[Factory/Legends|factory]] was located on the celestial body's southern continent.

At some point by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Valken Gresh]] captured [[Zaglis]], the [[Supreme Leader/Legends|Supreme Leader]] of the [[Neo-Fundamentalist Phlangites]] group, on Zaraksander. A [[Standard day/Legends|day]] later, the forces of the Phlangites had kidnapped the [[Cyrstas Eloinie|daughter]] of the Eloinie Petro-Munitions [[Darred Eloinie|chief executive officer]] while she had been participating in the [[Peaceful Dawn Rally]] demonstration. The [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|chief executive officer]] subsequently recruited Gresh to retrieve his [[Gender/Legends|daughter]] from the Phlangites in the Fioer [[Desert/Legends|desert]].

==Description==
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''[…]'' the next thing he knows, old Darred is being hit up for 100,000 credits and a munitions factory on the southern continent.|Valken Gresh, ''Great Hunts I've Lived To Tell About''|<ref name="GG10" />}}
Zaraksander was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="GG10" /> located in the [[Zaraksander system/Legends|Zaraksander system]], a part of the [[Imberlin sector/Legends|Imberlin sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The surface of Zaraksander featured at least one continent.<ref name="GG10" />

==History==
{{Quote|…yeah, I swore I'd never risk running up against Zaglis and his NFP goons again—not enough profit margin in it—but the way it happened was like this…|Valken Gresh, ''Great Hunts I've Lived To Tell About''|<ref name="GG10" />}}
By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' is set before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> the [[Neo-Fundamentalist Phlangites]] were active on Zaraksander. At one point, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Valken Gresh]] brought in the organization's [[Supreme Leader/Legends|Supreme Leader]] [[Zaglis]]. During the process, Gresh had to escape from the Phlangites in Zaraksander's [[Fioer desert]], leading the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] to swear off ever facing the group again.<ref name="GG10" />

Around the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Peaceful Dawn Rally]] was held, in which [[Cyrstas Eloinie]], the [[Gender/Legends|daughter]] of [[Eloinie Petro-Munitions]] [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|Chief Executive Officer]] [[Darred Eloinie]], displayed her support for the causes of the Neo-Fundamentalist Phlangites. During the demonstration, the Phlangites kidnapped Cyrstas and demanded a ransom payment from Darred.<ref name="GG10" />

Instead of paying the group, the elder Eloinie recruited Gresh to retrieve his daughter. Subsequently, on the following [[Standard day/Legends|day]] after Gresh's initial encounter with the NFP forces and three [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after the bounty hunter's recruitment by Eloinie's underling, Gresh was in the Fioer [[Desert/Legends|desert]] again, although the NFP were aware of the hunter's imminent arrival. Later, Gresh recorded the experiences on Zaraksander in the work ''[[Great Hunts I've Lived To Tell About]]''.<ref name="GG10" />

==Locations==
{{Quote|Three hours later, I'm back in the Fioer desert, going after the same bunch I'd just escaped from after bringing in their Supreme Leader…yesterday!|Valken Gresh, ''Great Hunts I've Lived To Tell About''|<ref name="GG10" />}}
The corporation Eloinie Petro-Munitions was based on Zaraksander, with one of its munitions [[Factory/Legends|factories]] being located on the celestial body's southern continent. The Fioer desert was a region on Zaraksander where the Neo-Fundamentalist Phlangites had a presence.<ref name="GG10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zaraksander was introduced in "[[You Never Can Tell]]," a short companion narrative included in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''. The book was authored by [[Rick D. Stuart]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG10" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zaraksander [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Zaraksander, in grid square P-14.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
